[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0010001 2
1 0010110 3
2 0000000 a
3 0100100 2
4 0000000 a
5 0100000 1
6 0110000 2
7 0010000 1

01 10 0100000 1 match 5
12 21 0010000 1 match 7
23 32 0010000 1 match 7
34 43 0010000 1 match 7

56 65 0000100 1
67 76 0100000 1 match 5
70 07 0100000 1 match 5

13 31 0010001 2 match 0
